1.png: The main creation screen where users input text prompts to generate videos.
2.png: Advanced settings allow customization of video style, aspect ratio, and duration.
3.png: A history view keeps track of all previously generated videos for easy access.
4.png: Generated videos can be previewed directly within the app before saving.
5.png: Seamless sharing options integrated with the native iOS share sheet.
6.png: Easily save the final video masterpiece to your device's photo library.
